name: postiz-extension
description: Postiz browser extension for cookie-based platform authentication

scripts.dev: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('dist',{recursive:true,force:true})" && HOT_RELOAD_EXTENSION_VITE_PORT=8081 NODE_ENV=development dotenv -e ../../.env -- vite build --config vite.config.chrome.ts --mode development --watch
